name: consent-checklist
title: Consent Checklist
description: Per-item consent affirmations that gate a submit action and record each text version.

props.name: items
props.description: Consent items: { id, label, description?, href?, required?, version? }.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires when any item is toggled.

props.name: onSubmit
props.description: If provided, renders a submit button gated until all required items are affirmed.

clinicalNotes: Consent must be an explicit affirmative action per item — items are never pre-checked, and legally distinct consents are never collapsed into a single blanket toggle. Each acceptance records which version of the consent text was agreed to (a caller-supplied `version`), since wording changes over time and prior consents must remain attributable. Optional items are clearly marked and never block submission; only required items gate it.
notes: Round-2 form component; composes checkbox + button. Records { id, version } per acceptance.
